creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
I need your help, travel friends 👀👇

The weather here in Copenhagen has been pretty damn grim for a long time, and the forecast is saying it’ll stay like that for the foreseeable future ☔️🌧️

So I’m looking at flights to Southern Europe, at the moment, I’m contemplating where to go for a little Southern Europe trip later this month to see the sun ☀️

What is your favourite summertime travel destination in Europe? 🇪🇺 #europetravel #traveltips #eurosummer

transcription.text: Oh, I wasn't sad, I just needed a...
